translation: I have a lot of work.
I am proud of this project.

word: Здравствуйте, чем я могу вам помочь?
latin_okunusu: Zdravstvuyte, chem ya mogu vam pomoch'?
translation: Hello, how can I help you?
I would like to schedule a meeting.
We need to reschedule the meeting.

word: Можете соединить меня с господином Пападопулосом?
latin_okunusu: Mozhete soyedinit' menya s gospodinom Papadopulosom?
translation: Could you connect me with Mr. Papadopoulos?
I am calling regarding the project.

word: Не могли бы вы это подтвердить?
latin_okunusu: Ne mogli by vy eto podtverdit'?

word: Я свяжусь с вами в ближайшее время.
latin_okunusu: Ya svyazhus' s vami v blizhaysheye vremya.
translation: I will be in touch shortly.

word: Можем ли мы поговорить по телефону?
latin_okunusu: Mozhem li my pogovorit' po telefonu?
translation: Can we talk over the phone?
I am working on the presentation.

word: Можем ли мы изменить время встречи?
latin_okunusu: Mozhem li my izmenit' vremya vstrechi?
translation: Can we change the meeting time?

word: Сегодня я весь день на встречах.
latin_okunusu: Segodnya ya ves' den' na vstrechakh.
translation: I am in meetings all day today.
I am on vacation until Friday.
Who is in charge of this project?
I will get back to you soon.
I would be happy to help.

word: У вас есть для меня документы?
latin_okunusu: U vas yest' dlya menya dokumenty?
translation: Do you have the documents for me?
I am sending you an invitation.
What does your schedule look like?

word: Можем ли мы встретиться в пятницу?
latin_okunusu: Mozhem li my vstretit'sya v pyatnitsu?

word: У вас есть время для краткой беседы?
latin_okunusu: U vas yest' vremya dlya kratkoy besedy?
translation: Do you have time for a brief talk?
I am sending you a draft.
We need to work more efficiently.

word: У вас есть доступ к файлу?
latin_okunusu: U vas yest' dostup k faylu?
translation: Do you have access to the file?
We are looking for new employees.
What is the purpose of this meeting?
I am sending you the agenda.

word: Я не могу судить об этом.
latin_okunusu: Ya ne mogu sudit' ob etom.

word: Можем ли мы отложить этот вопрос?
latin_okunusu: Mozhem li my otlozhit' etot vopros?

translation: We need to coordinate our actions.
I am satisfied with the result.

word: У меня нет на это времени.
latin_okunusu: U menya net na eto vremeni.
translation: I don't have time for this.
The offer is valid until tomorrow.
I am grateful for your help.

word: Есть ли у вас отзывы об этом?
latin_okunusu: Yest' li u vas otzyvy ob etom?
translation: Do you have any feedback on this?

word: Я учусь чему-то новому каждый день.
latin_okunusu: Ya uchus' chemu-to novomu kazhdyy den'.
translation: I learn something new every day.
Repetition is the mother of learning.
I have a plan for success.
What is my goal for today?
Patience is the key to success.

word: Как я могу сделать это лучше?
latin_okunusu: Kak ya mogu sdelat' eto luchshe?
translation: How can I do this better?
I am open to new ideas.
This is a challenge for me.

word: Я сравниваю себя только с собой.
latin_okunusu: Ya sravnivayu sebya tol'ko s soboy.
translation: I only compare myself to myself.
I am ready to try new things.
I work in a structured way.
I am proud of my journey.
I am calm in difficult moments.
I am grateful for the experience.

word: Я не упускаю цель из виду.
latin_okunusu: Ya ne upuskayu tsel' iz vidu.
translation: I keep my goal in sight.
I am interested in the future.
I learn from those around me.

word: Я размышляю о том, что узнал.
latin_okunusu: Ya razmyshlyayu o tom, chto uznal.
translation: I reflect on what I learned.
I am ready for something new.
I set aside time to think.
I work in a disciplined way.
I am loyal to my vision.

Do you have a vacant room?

I want to call a taxi.

Can you take a photo of me?

word: Есть ли билет на весь день?
latin_okunusu: Yest' li bilet na ves' den'?

translation: How do I get to the airport?
I want to rent a bicycle.
I want a room with a view.
How long does the trip take?

I am looking for a park.
How do I get to this museum?
Do you have a vegetarian dish?

Where is the bus to the airport?
I need a taxi for tomorrow.
I am looking for an inexpensive hotel.

word: Я хочу узнать больше о городе.
latin_okunusu: Ya khochu uznat' bol'she o gorode.
translation: I want to learn more about the city.
I want to rent a car.
Where can I buy a ticket?
I want to see the old town.

I am looking forward to it.
I need some peace and quiet.

word: Это очень любезно с твоей стороны.
latin_okunusu: Eto ochen' lyubezno s tvoyey storony.

translation: Do you want something to drink?
